methodology: Outcome-based OKRs connected to customer jobs, product capabilities, and product bricks.
okrDesignPrinciples: Use measurable customer and business outcomes
Tie initiatives to product bricks and teams
description: Keep-the-lights-on objectives for reliability, compliance, and platform operations

companyObjectives.name: Grow trusted cloud data and AI adoption

objectives.name: Maintain reliable regulated data and AI operations
objectives.description: Keep control-plane and runtime operations stable while audit and incident obligations are met.
